name: inbox-command-center
description: Inbox Command Center — AI communications manager that triages Gmail, Slack, iMessage, and messaging platforms. Auto-categorizes messages, drafts replies in your authentic voice (learned from transcripts, sent emails, and A/B calibration), manages calendar conflicts, tracks tasks, creates smart rules, delivers scheduled daily briefings, and sends reminders via dedicated Slack channel, Slack DM, or iMessage. Integrates with Brand Knowledge Center for brand-voice drafting.
